driver_subject: bus: fsl-mc-msi: Simplify MSI descriptor handling
kernel_subject: genirq/msi: Provide domain flags to allocate/free MSI descriptors automatically
stage1_reason: Multiple commits explicitly adapt to MSI subsystem API changes: replacing custom fsl_mc.msi_index with standard msi_index, using msi_get_virq() instead of msi_desc->irq, adding MSI_FLAG_* flags, and removing manual MSI descriptor allocation/free functions in favor of core MSI infrastructure.
stage2_reason: Driver commits explicitly adapt to new MSI infrastructure introduced by kernel commit 645474e2cee4, which added MSI_FLAG_ALLOC_SIMPLE_MSI_DESCS and MSI_FLAG_FREE_MSI_DESCS flags for automatic descriptor management - directly matching driver changes removing manual allocation/free functions and using msi_setup_device_data.
